title: ASR Outdoor First Aid Bug Out Emergency Light Mylar Foil Space Blanket
description:
Individually sealed and conveniently folded in half to fit in the palm of your hand or pocket. Same size and protection as the other blankets when unfolded, but takes up half the size when folded. You can easily throw them in your hiking backpack, car, first aid kit, go-bag, camping gear, or emergency kit at home or work. Blankets are reusable, waterproof, windproof, moisture-proof. Stay warm, help prevent hypothermia or shock in emergencies, and keep yourself and your family safe. It all starts with the material, metalized polyethylene, that reflects 90% of your body heat while also offering several other essential features that set it apart from traditional mylar blankets

ASR Outdoor First Aid Bug Out Emergency Light Mylar Foil Space Blanket

Individually sealed and conveniently folded in half to fit in the palm of your hand or pocket. Same size and protection as the other blankets when unfolded, but takes up half the size when folded. You can easily throw them in your hiking backpack, car, first aid kit, go-bag, camping gear, or emergency kit at home or work. Blankets are reusable, waterproof, windproof, moisture-proof. Stay warm, help prevent hypothermia or shock in emergencies, and keep yourself and your family safe.

Key Features

  • MYLAR EMERGENCY BLANKET – Your pack will have a mylar sheet, also called space blankets, individually wrapped in a re-sealable zip-lock bag. Always keep some: in your car, truck, first aid kit, emergency kit, backpack, jacket pockets, bug out bag, hiking, hunting, fishing or camping gear.
  • LARGE & DUAL REFLECTIVE SURFACE – Dimensions of 52”L x 83.5"W can accommodate up to 6’ 5” tall adults, very light 2oz, effective addition to your thermal control gear, reflects back up to 90% of your body heat, 12-micron aluminized polyethylene mylar, resistant, windproof, waterproof, moisture proof, dual reflective sides for rescue signaling.
  • FEW WAYS TO USE YOUR BLANKET - Wrap in it for extra warmth, extra layer in sleeping bag, improvised poncho, effective sunshade cooling, rain shelter, catching rain, fishing lure, sling, tourniquet, protect your backpack from rain, form a water carrying device, etc.
  • MANUFACTURED FROM THE BEST WATERPROOF MATERIAL - Waterproof and weatherproof foil and Mylar emergency thermal blanket for retaining or deflecting heat. Mylar insert provides insulation and the foil cover can reflect heat back to the body or deflect heat from the sun
  • COMPACT - Provides compact emergency protection in all weather conditions: Perfect for camping trips and sporting events. uses are nearly limitless: use as tent footprint, backpack cover, rain poncho, emergency signal, solar oven, shade cover, fishing lure, bird repellent, emergency shelter, sleeping bag liner, ground cover, bivouac sack, wind blocker, arm sling, tourniquet, bivvy, trail marker, water collector, snow melt container and so on.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: EMFAB
  • UPC: 060886950608
  • Color: Yellow
  • Size: 52 in x 83.5 in

It all starts with the material, metalized polyethylene, that reflects 90% of your body heat while also offering several other essential features that set it apart from traditional mylar blankets. Our ultralight blankets are popular with everyone from emergency responders to endurance athletes using them to prevent sweat chills after running marathons. The most advanced emergency blanket on the market - meticulously designed to for outdoor enthusiast, the marathon runner or emergency first aid responders. Perfect for hiking, camping, boating, hunting, and surviving in the cold outdoors.

Our emergency thermal blankets are individually packed in zip-lock bags for easy transport and storage. Emergency Thermal Blanket provides convenient, secure protection in all cold or warm weather states. A waterproof and windproof shelter barrier, and a covering to help reduce shock when someone is injured. Emergency thermal blanket to be used as an emergency shelter.
